name: ISweep
description: Safe content filtering for a better browsing experience

_comment_permissions.storage: Persist extension and filtering preferences across sessions so user choices stick.
_comment_permissions.tabs: Inspect tab metadata to align caption handling with the correct YouTube tab.
_comment_permissions.activeTab: Interact only with the user’s active tab when applying mute/skip actions triggered by captions.
_comment_permissions.scripting: Inject caption listener scripts into YouTube pages to monitor captions and relay them to the backend.

_comment_host_permissions: Localhost endpoints are used by the ISweep backend during development; <all_urls> supports existing content script coverage including YouTube.
